description_long: This figure depicts a highly stylized humanoid with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a slender, contorted body. The head is smooth and featureless, resembling a mannequin or android, and the arms extend into sharp, blade-like appendages. The upper body is clad in a fitted, modern jacket with a high collar, while the lower half features cropped pants and high-top footwear with visible straps and details. The overall form is dynamic, as if caught mid-motion, with limbs twisted in an unnatural, almost insect-like pose. The surface finish is sleek and synthetic, suggesting a futuristic or cybernetic interpretation of a pedestrian.
description: A futuristic, stylized humanoid with elongated limbs, a featureless head, and sharp, blade-like arms, dressed in modern urban clothing and high-top footwear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the featureless head, contorted torso, and extended blade-like arms, with the chest and upper body details most visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme elongation of the limbs, the curvature of the spine, and the profile of the head and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, the structure of the legs, and the attachment points of the blade-like appendages.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizes the twisted posture, the dynamic leg positioning, and the sharp, extended arms from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted modern jacket and cropped pants with high-top footwear
attribute_posture: dynamic, contorted mid-motion pose with elongated limbs
